name: orchestrated-delivery
description: Lightweight delivery loop and Codex thread management for complex goals and user acceptance.

interface.shortDescription: Keep complex goals aligned, verified, reviewed, and accepted.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight delivery-loop and thread-management plugin for keeping complex goals aligned, scoped, researched, planned, executed in reviewable slices, verified, reviewed, and brought to user acceptance without unnecessary workflow paperwork.
defaultPrompt: Drive this goal through alignment, approach, acceptance, execution, verification, review, and user acceptance.
Use $grill-with-docs when the goal, design, domain language, or tradeoffs need sharper questioning.
Use $codex-thread-manager to inspect, coordinate, and organize Codex threads for this goal.
